title: String Names
description: Make item names match their ID/String
body:
A language pack modifying en_us/American English to give items names matching their ID.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FYkpsm3D/images/ce7e181d0b478a52395cd21e81d605fd49e13266.webp)
#
Some notable examples:

[minecraft:experience_bottle] Bottle o' Enchanting -> Experience Bottle 

[minecraft:iron_block] Block of Iron -> Iron Block (same for every other material like diamond, redstone etc.)

[minecraft.cooked_beef] Steak -> Cooked Beef

[minecraft.leather_chestplate] Leather Tunic -> Leather Chestplate

[minecraft.writable_book] Book and Quill -> Writable Book
#
For the full list of the over 100 changed names please check [the language file.](https://github.com/Godeps2891/string-names/tree/main/assets/minecraft/lang/en_us.json)
